decisions.decision: 4 plans in 3 waves: domain+repo → store+integrations → UI (parallel)
decisions.rationale: Dependency order: pure functions first, then store orchestration, then UI in parallel
HUD dungeon theme transformation needs visual review

decisions.decision: HUD pixel dungeon door icon opens bottom sheet for session controls
decisions.rationale: Quick access without adding a full navigation tab

decisions.decision: Preset duration chips (2hr, 4hr, 6hr, 8hr) with Daily/Deep toggle
decisions.rationale: Fast tap selection, clear variant distinction

decisions.decision: Full dungeon HUD theme during active session
decisions.rationale: Dramatic immersive experience — HUD transforms with stone walls, torches, new palette

decisions.decision: Compassionate mentor voice on early exit, proportional XP penalty, one retry/day
decisions.rationale: No-shame philosophy, fair scaling, balanced forgiveness

decisions.decision: Visible shield icon on habit cards during active detox (overlapping habits only)
decisions.rationale: Reduces anxiety, prevents gaming by scoping to session window
Long-term motivation for repeated detox sessions
